steps.title: Use Alexander's routine
steps.content: Alexander is very busy, works at the office, avoids clubs, and usually dines alone. These details show that he is working almost all the time.

steps.title: Match the context meaning
steps.content: Choice B describes speed, Choice C describes fear, and Choice D describes sufficiency. In context, “constantly” means without stopping or with very few breaks, so “Nonstop” fits. The answer is A.
